name: Curcuma Wenyujin
summary: Curcuma wenyujin contains Beta-elemene and is linked here to PI3K/Akt modulation.
description: Curcuma wenyujin contains Beta-elemene and is linked here to PI3K/Akt modulation.
contraindications: pregnancy because it is a traditional Chinese medicine blood-invigorating herb that can stimulate uterine contraction
warfarin or other anticoagulant or antiplatelet medication because it has documented antiplatelet and anticoagulant activity that may increase bleeding risk
bleeding disorder or upcoming surgery because of its blood-thinning pharmacology
heavy menstrual bleeding because its blood-moving action may worsen flow
known allergy to Zingiberaceae family plants because Curcuma wenyujin is in the ginger family

sources.title: Curcuma wenyujin extract alleviates cognitive deficits and restrains pyroptosis through PINK1/Parkin mediated autophagy in Alzheimer's disease
Curcuma wenyujin rhizomes extract ameliorates lipid accumulation
Two new guaiane-type sesquiterpenes from Curcuma wenyujin
